source_note: Public sanitized version center. Private RANI_OS repository remains source of truth.

applications.plain_language: RANI_OS governance and runtime are active. Current focus is Admin Web infrastructure and safe dashboard delivery.
applications.owner_gate: Admin Web UI review remains open; Trading Evidence remains parked
applications.next_candidate: Generated projection discipline and safe funnel model

applications.status: STABLE WITH PATCH / FUNNEL ROLLED BACK
applications.plain_language: Admin Web is stable on GitHub Pages. CR-015 attempted a Capability Funnel but caused a loading failure, so it was rolled back. Visual status and app scope are applied as a safe patch on top of CR-013.
applications.rollback_reason: Page stuck on Loading RANI OS Admin CR-015 Capability Funnel
applications.owner_gate: Do not promote a new funnel build until it passes isolated preview testing
applications.next_candidate: CR-016 Safe Funnel Preview in dev/test only

applications.plain_language: Trading application exists as architecture and model knowledge, but trading evidence and execution work are parked until owner resumes that lane.
applications.next_candidate: Trading Evidence lane only after owner decision

applications.plain_language: Pool controller is recognized as a separate future application. It is not mixed with RANI_OS or RANI_TRADING and is not currently implemented.

rules: Every app has its own version state.
Admin Web rollback must not imply RANI_OS rollback.
Trading and Pool versions are independent from Admin Web versions.
Failed builds must remain visible in plain language until superseded.
